title: MCP server for Brazilian soccer created
evidence: src/index.ts:21-24 defines Server with MCP SDK

title: Match queries by team, date range, competition, season
evidence: src/index.ts:29-47 search_matches tool, searchMatches() tested in tests/queries.test.ts:40-106

title: Team queries with statistics, head-to-head, home/away records
evidence: src/index.ts:62-74 get_team_stats tool, src/index.ts:50-59 head_to_head tool, tests:111-146

title: Player queries by name, nationality, club, rating
evidence: src/index.ts:92-104 search_players tool, searchPlayers() tested in tests/queries.test.ts:162-189

title: Competition standings calculated from match results
evidence: src/index.ts:77-89 get_standings tool, getStandings() tested in tests/queries.test.ts:150-161

title: Statistical analysis: goals per match, home win rate, biggest wins
evidence: src/index.ts:107-134 get_statistics and get_best_teams tools, tests:190-235

title: Team name normalization with state suffix handling
evidence: src/normalize.ts:1-106 normalizeTeamName() handles 60+ team aliases and state suffixes, tests/normalize.test.ts:1-89

title: Multiple date format handling (ISO, Brazilian DD/MM/YYYY, with time)
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts:11-24 parseDate() function handles all formats, tests confirm date parsing

title: All 6 CSV data files loadable and queryable
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts:143-153 loadAllData() loads 5 match files + FIFA players, src/__tests__/queries.test.ts:31-36 verifies all 6 sources

title: UTF-8 support for Portuguese text (accents, cedilla)
evidence: src/dataLoader.ts:38 strips BOM, normalize.ts handles São Paulo, Grêmio, Avaí, Fortaleza, Ceará, Vitória, Goiás, etc.

title: TypeScript build succeeds
evidence: npm run build completed without errors, tsc generated dist/ directory

title: All 30 tests passing with 100% effective rate
evidence: vitest run: 30 passed (2 files), 0 skipped, 0 failed, 3.6s total execution time

title: Minimal dependencies: 2 core + 4 dev
evidence: package.json: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, csv-parse; devDependencies: @types/node, tsx, typescript, vitest
